tweet.text: Can smell basketball season around the corner 🎱 #MileHighBaby https://t.co/bIfThFmnRy

RT @nuggets: Can't talk defense, without talking P-Wat 🚫
Full block vid on YT: https://t.co/1GhoZvjif3 https://t.co/AiAHb2070g

RT @nuggets: Beyond being just a lockdown defender, Peyton can get it done on the other end of the floor 🪣
